meta.description: An elegant, premium e-commerce site for hair extensions. The design features soft, muted tones, elegant typography with serif italic accents, and high-quality editorial photography focused on natural beauty and lifestyle.

header.notes: Minimal standard header with logo left, nav center, icons right. An announcement bar sits above.

footer.description: Newsletter signup integrated into the left side of a multi-column footer.
footer.notes: 4 columns. Leftmost is newsletter signup (email, phone, subscribe). The other 3 are link lists. Social icons below signup. Region selector at the bottom left.

productCard.notes: Clean minimal cards. Portrait format images. Very prominent solid dark blue CTA buttons under the text in category view, but standard product grids are minimal without visible add-to-cart.

productGrid.notes: Standard grid for individual products, no borders.

featuredProducts.heading: Recommendations For You
featuredProducts.notes: Standard 5-column carousel or scrollable row for products.

sections.name: announcement-bar

design.styling: Very narrow, sitting at the very top.

sections.notes: Arrows on left/right suggest a carousel of messages.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full-width single column, split content over image

design.background: Full-bleed lifestyle photograph of product on light blue background
design.text: White text on right side, mix of bold sans and italic serif display font
design.styling: A large promotional sticker graphic on the left.

content.headline: Aspirational statement about confidence and tools
content.body: Promotional offer details with legal text below
content.cta: Single solid white button, dark text, sharp corners (0rem)

media.description: Lifestyle shot of hair tools and hair scattered on a soft blue background.

content.specialElements: Starburst-shaped promotional graphic sticker on top left.

design.text: Dark foreground, serif typography with bullet separators

sections.name: brand-statement
sections.layout: Full-width single column, centered content, max-width ~800px

design.text: Dark foreground, elegant serif typography with italicized accents

content.headline: Brand philosophy statement about beauty at every life stage

sections.name: featured-categories

design.text: Dark foreground, clean sans-serif for descriptions, bold titles
design.styling: Cards with no shadow, sharp corners.

content.cta: Dark blue solid buttons, sharp corners (0rem), full width of content area under text.

media.description: Lifestyle photography of diverse models showing off hair.

content.specialElements: A floating dark promotional tab stuck to the left edge.

sections.notes: A sticky tab on the left viewport edge says 'Get Offer'.

design.background: Full-bleed lifestyle image showing diverse models
design.text: White text, serif heading, sans-serif body

content.headline: Invitation to find perfect product
content.cta: Single white button, dark text, sharp corners (0rem)

media.description: Group shot of three women smiling, showing off healthy hair.

sections.name: shop-by-shade
sections.layout: Centered headline, flex row of circular swatches, actions below

content.headline: Category identifier for shopping by color
content.cta: Single dark blue solid button, sharp corners (0rem). Secondary text link below.

design.background: Full-width split image/color background (warm beige/khaki tones)
design.text: White elegant serif text, centered in columns
design.styling: Vertical separator lines between the text statements.

media.description: Abstract/close-up shot of blonde hair texture used as background.

design.styling: Image is irregular shape/cutout on the right.

content.headline: Headline mixing sans and italic serif for styling
content.cta: Single black solid button, white text, sharp corners (0rem)

design.text: Dark foreground, small sans-serif for product titles and prices

design.text: Dark foreground, very small text in small overlapping cards
design.styling: Images have play buttons indicating video. Overlapping small product info cards at the bottom of each.

design.styling: Gap between columns, dark gradient overlay on bottom of images.
